mano_cua.result_summary: Chrome 缓存了旧页面（Discord Data Package Explorer），导致 localhost:3000 显示白屏而非 Nuxt PWA 应用。服务端 curl 验证返回 200，但浏览器端始终白屏。且该任务需要 DevTools 离线模式测试，mano-cua 无法可靠操作。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page continues to show white screen. Chrome appears to be showing cached content from a previous application (Discord Data Package Explorer) instead of the Nuxt PWA app.
